name: fmsarchitects.com
message: [AI generated] FMS Architects, established in 1983, is a UK based architectural firm that is influenced by modernist principles. With experience in educational, commercial, and residential sectors, their architects work closely with clients and co-consultants to deliver bespoke architectural outcomes. Their ambition is to create buildings which optimize spatial potential and minimize environmental impact. They are committed to leading on sustainability within the design and construction industry.
